video:video.video:title: Vertical farming: the difficult second act | FT Rethink
video:video.video:description: Vertical farming has been a boom industry, but it's also seen a high number of business failures. Recently, investment funding has dropped significantly. Despite that, there are broader economic and structural reasons that could potentially boost demand for vertical farms. So, where does the industry stand now?
